identity.name: Guido Tomasella
identity.kicker: Data governance · Data engineering · AI leadership
identity.tagline: I lead data quality, governance and engineering — and amplify all of it with AI and agents.

amplifier.message: Governance that scales because agents consume a living knowledge graph.
Quality shifts from reactive to proactive with AI-assisted observability.
Engineering accelerates with copilots and autonomous documentation.
AI in production, responsibly — agents that audit, document and plan.

experience.summary: Founded and led a federated data governance practice across LatAm, turning governance into a business enabler powered by agents.

experience.role: Data Governance Team Leader & Tech Lead
experience.summary: Architected the data platform and the first formal governance layer over a multi-terabyte estate.
Led the shift to a data-centric operating model for the video datacenter.
